channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260520)
item.description:
What's New

feat: add clipboard paste injection method for TUI apps (Kiro CLI)

  • Add TextSendingMethod.paste for apps that drop CGEvent Unicode chars
  • Add PasteConfig struct with configurable parameters (delays, key combo,

posting method, settle time) and presets (.tuiApp, .remoteDesktop)

  • Integrate PasteConfig into InjectionMethodInfo, WindowTitleRule,

MergedRuleResult with full Codable support

  • Add Kiro CLI window title rule using .paste + .tuiApp config
  • sendTextViaPaste: clipboard set → Cmd+V via CGEvent.post → wait
  • Skip settle time when pasteConfig.skipSettleTime = true
  • No clipboard restore (avoids race condition on fast typing)

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
